overview.description: Digital marketing in Vietnam is maturing rapidly, driven by social commerce and mobile-first consumers. AI use cases include programmatic advertising, customer segmentation, campaign optimization, and attribution modeling.
overview.marketSizeVietnam: ~$1.5B digital advertising market; social commerce growing 40%+ YoY
overview.marketSizeSEA: ~$12B digital ad market; influencer marketing and programmatic AI adoption growing

domainKnowledge.typicalDataVolume: High — digital ad platforms generate billions of events per day
domainKnowledge.dataQuality: Medium — first-party data good; third-party cookies deprecating creates gaps

painPoints.problem: Customer segmentation is manual and based on simple demographics
Ad creative optimization and personalization is slow and costly
Attribution modeling across multiple channels is inaccurate
Content discovery and search for branded content is poor

relatedNodes.description: Retail and marketing share customer segmentation and personalization.
Media and marketing share audience targeting and ad technology.
